message.content: ["Drift-free Visual SLAM using Digital Twins.", "Globally-consistent localization in urban environments is crucial for autonomous systems such as self-driving vehicles and drones, as well as assistive technologies for visually impaired people.", "Traditional Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO) and Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (VSLAM) methods suffer from drift in the long term due to reliance on local sensor data."]

While GPS counteracts this drift, it is unavailable indoors and often unr"
